title: How to average a range while ignoring zeros (and blanks)
task: Get the mean of only the non-zero numbers, so empty or zero cells don't drag the average down.

excel.note: Blanks are already ignored by AVERAGE/AVERAGEIF; this also drops zeros.

explanation: AVERAGEIF(range, "<>0") averages only the cells that are not equal to zero. With 10/0/20/0/30 it averages 10, 20 and 30 = 20. Blank cells are ignored automatically.
